common.hero_description: No registration. Just scan the QR code at your village panchayat and get instant access to all official notices, find officials, and file complaints.

modal.report_complaints_item_2: • Track status: Pending → In Progress → Resolved

messages.irrigation_recommended_high_temp: Irrigation is recommended because temperature is high and the crop was not irrigated recently.
messages.avoid_irrigation_rainfall: Avoid irrigation today because rainfall is expected.
messages.irrigation_optional: Irrigation is optional today. Check soil moisture before watering.
messages.avoid_spraying_rain_wind: Avoid spraying today because rain or strong wind may reduce spray effectiveness.
messages.spraying_suitable: Spraying is suitable today. Prefer early morning or evening.
messages.delay_fertilizer_rainfall: Delay fertilizer application because rainfall may wash away nutrients.
messages.fertilizer_suitable: Fertilizer application is suitable if soil condition is proper.
messages.rain_expected_today: Rain is expected today. Be careful with irrigation and spraying.
messages.normal_farm_weather: Weather looks normal for farm work today.
messages.advisory_note: This advisory is based on weather forecast and farmer inputs. For critical decisions, consult a local agriculture officer.

conditions.partly_cloudy_no_rain: Partly cloudy with no chance of rain
conditions.afternoon_showers: Rain showers expected in the afternoon
